summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Courses feature. All backend APIs (16/16 tests passed) and frontend UI features working correctly. Admin can create/edit/delete courses, modules, sub-modules, and sessions with different content types (video, quiz, pdf, mixed). Candidate view shows hierarchical navigation with expand/collapse, content type icons, and Free badges. Video player, Quiz, and PDF modals all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Course hierarchy (Courses -> Modules -> Sub-Modules -> Sessions) properly implemented
Admin Course Management UI has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Content type icons display correctly: Video (blue), Quiz (purple), PDF (red), Mixed (emerald)
Free badge displays on sessions marked as is_free=true
Video player modal opens YouTube videos correctly with title and description
Quiz modal shows questions with multiple choice options and progress tracking
PDF modal shows iframe viewer with 'Open in New Tab' option
Candidate view properly locks content after first 2 sessions for free users
Course Progress bar shows completion status

test_credentials.full_prep_user: Click 'Log in as Candidate' -> 'Full Prep (15 sessions)'

seed_data_creation: Course 'Case Interview Fundamentals' with Module 'Market Sizing', Sub-Module 'Basic Framework', and 3 sessions (video, quiz, pdf) already exists in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Courses feature fully implemented and tested. Backend APIs: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE for /api/admin/courses, /api/admin/courses/modules, /api/admin/courses/submodules, /api/admin/courses/sessions. Candidate API: GET /api/resources/courses returns hierarchical course data with access control. Frontend: Admin has CoursesManagement.jsx, Candidate has CoursesPage.jsx. All modals (VideoPlayerModal, QuizModal, PDFModal) working correctly.

admin_get_courses.details: GET /api/admin/courses returns courses with full hierarchy

admin_create_video_session.details: POST /api/admin/courses/sessions creates video session with is_free flag

admin_create_quiz_session.details: POST /api/admin/courses/sessions creates quiz session with quiz_questions

admin_create_pdf_session.details: POST /api/admin/courses/sessions creates PDF session with pdf_url

candidate_get_courses.details: GET /api/resources/courses returns courses with access control

candidate_free_user_access.details: Free users have limited access (first 2 sessions unlocked)

admin_ui_courses_section.details: Admin sidebar shows 'Courses' link, Course Management section loads

admin_ui_add_course_modal.details: Add Course modal with title, description, thumbnail fields

admin_ui_hierarchy_display.details: Course tree view with expand/collapse for modules, submodules, sessions

admin_ui_content_type_icons.details: Video (blue), Quiz (purple), PDF (red) icons display correctly

candidate_ui_courses_page.details: Courses page shows progress bar, course cards, hierarchical navigation

candidate_ui_video_modal.details: Video player modal opens with YouTube embed, title, description

candidate_ui_quiz_modal.details: Quiz modal shows questions, options, progress, submit button

candidate_ui_pdf_modal.details: PDF modal shows iframe viewer with 'Open in New Tab' button

candidate_ui_free_badge.details: Free badge displays on sessions marked as free

mocked_apis.payments: Razorpay payments are MOCKED (no API keys configured)
